title: Device Home screen - Software version
scenario: Verify that the software version is displayed correctly on the Device Home screen according to device-specific format requirements.
steps: Navigate to the Device Home screen.
Locate the software version display area.

Check the software version format based on device type:
   - For Morpheus devices: Verify format is X.Y where X = firmware version, Y = language version.
   - For Neo and Chronos devices: Verify format is in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
expected: Software version is displayed correctly on the Device Home screen:\n- Morpheus devices: SW version in format X.Y (X = firmware version, Y = language version).\n- Neo and Chronos devices: SW version in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
